articles.summary: Mizuho Securities has increased its price target on Targa Resources (TRGP) to $300 from $260, while reaffirming an Outperform rating on the stock. Targa Resources is a North American provider of midstream services, specializing in natural gas gathering, processing, and NGL logistics and transportation.

articles.title: Vistra Corp. $VST Stock Holdings Increased by Legal & General Group Plc
articles.summary: Legal & General Group Plc significantly increased its stake in Vistra Corp. ($VST) by 12.2% in the fourth quarter, now holding over 1.76 million shares valued at $285.3 million. This increase follows Vistra's strong quarterly earnings, where the company surpassed analyst expectations for EPS and revenue and also raised its quarterly dividend. The stock maintains a consensus "Buy" rating from Wall Street analysts with an average target price of $233.33.

articles.title: Harbour Investments Inc. Has $4.85 Million Stock Position in PepsiCo, Inc. $PEP
articles.summary: Harbour Investments Inc. significantly increased its stake in PepsiCo, Inc. during the fourth quarter, now holding 33,774 shares valued at approximately $4.85 million. PepsiCo reported strong financial results, beating EPS and revenue expectations, and raised its quarterly dividend while also having a substantial share buyback authorization. Despite a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts, the company shows positive sentiment around innovation and pricing power, though competitive pressures and potential demand softness due to price increases are noted concerns.

articles.title: Targa Resources, Inc. $TRGP Shares Sold by Legal & General Group Plc
articles.summary: Legal & General Group Plc has reduced its stake in Targa Resources (NYSE:TRGP) by 9.0%, selling 144,196 shares to hold approximately 1.46 million shares valued at $269.4 million. Despite this, Wall Street analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for TRGP with a consensus price target of $266.36. Targa Resources recently increased its quarterly dividend to $1.25 per share, offering an annualized yield of about 1.8%, even though its Q1 earnings were below expectations.
